header.description: Find B2B emails and enrich contacts

enrich.description: Find B2B emails and enrich your contact from his name and his website

simplify.description: When off, waits for the contact data before completing. Waiting time can be adjusted with Extend Wait Time option. When on, returns a request_id that can be used later in the Fetch Request operation.

waitTime.description: When not simplifying the response, data will be fetched in two steps. This parameter controls how long to wait (in seconds) before trying the second step.

siren.description: Whether you want the SIREN number, NAF code, TVA number, company address and informations about the company leader. Only applies to french companies.

language.description: Whether the response is in English or French
